sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Check bottom-right grid current bottom-right grid state
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['b', 'R'] and n['pixels'] == 36:

        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        if min_r >= 36 and min_c >= 36:
            print(n['id'], n['color'], min_r, min_c)
</parameter>
